Top reviewed

Across the leading medical products, use cases cluster around self-triage, longitudinal tracking, and home-based support. Skinive AI: Skin Scanner, health checkup emphasizes photo-based skin risk checks and mole mapping; Docus.ai centers on symptom and lab interpretation with optional clinician review; AIWatchfulCompanion extends into caregiving with real-time monitoring, alerts, and incident capture for families.

results.title: Hecco AI: Your personal health intelligence engine | Product Hunt
results.content:
Yrillionaire 

This sounds like exactly what healthcare needed! Finally, an AI that actually understands your personal health data instead of giving generic advice. Love that it cuts through the medical jargon and gives you real insights you can actually use. Game-changer for anyone tired of one-size-fits-all health apps.RetryClaude can make mistakes. Please double check responses.

ROSHAN 

Health stuff gets overwhelming real fast, so having something that actually explains things clearly is huge. rooting for hecco, this is needed!

Kavya
Ankita Kanojia
Jayesh Chauhan [...] minimalist phone: reduce your screentime

I think it is pretty complex tho I wouldn't recommend it to people who suffer from some kind of hypochondriasis, because the possible materials about existing diseases could scare them.  
  
But the idea is brilliant to me!

Aman Pandey
Hecco AI

Hecco AI

@busmark\_w\_nika True. I guess this mostly help people who wants second opinion, People with chronic care condition and needs help and productivity hackers

Kavya

I love how Hecco brings clarity to healthcare data—and that’s a game-changer. The clean design and focus on turning scattered medical data into clear, actionable insights really stand out.

Excited to see how this evolves and helps users manage their health more confidently and proactively.
